title: Vehicle to vehicle and vehicle to infrastructure response monitoring
abstract: A system for determining driver errors includes an interface and a processor. The interface is configured to receive a safety warning from a safety warning system. The processor is configured to determine an appropriate driver response based at least in part on the safety warning; determine a driver response; determine whether the driver response comprises the appropriate driver response; and in the event the driver response does not comprise the appropriate driver response, indicating a driver error.
claims:
Claims 1. A system for determining driver errors, comprising: an interface configured to receive a safety warning from a safety warning system; a processor configured to: determine an appropriate driver response based at least in part on the safety waming; determine a driver response; and determine whether the driver response comprises the appropriate driver response; and in the event the driver response does not comprise the appropriate driver response, indicating a driver error. 2. The system of claim 1, wherein the safety waming system comprises a vehicle to vehicle communications system. 3. The system of claim 1, wherein the safety waming system comprises a vehicle to infrastructure communications system. 4. The system claim 1, wherein the safety waming system comprises a vehicle to device communications system. 5. The system of claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises slowing down. 6. The system of claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises pulling over. 7. The system claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises hard braking. 8. The system of claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises looking around. 9. The system of claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises turning on vehicle lights. 10. The system of claim 1, wherein the appropriate driver response comprises increasing following distance. 11. The system of claim 1, wherein the driver response is determined based at least in part on vehicle event recorder data. 12. The system of claim 1, wherein the driver response is determined based at least in part on sensor data. 13. The system of claim 1, wherein indicating a driver error comprises providing coaching information. 14. The system of claim 1, wherein indicating a driver error comprises recording sensor data. 15. The system of claim 1, wherein indicating a driver error comprises recording video data. 16. The system of claim 1, wherein indicating a driver error comprises recording safety warning system data. 17. The system of claim 1, wherein indicating a driver error comprises providing an indication to the driver. 18. The system of claim 15, wherein the indication to the driver comprises a light indication. 19. The system of claim 15, wherein the indication to the driver comprises a sound indication. 20. The system of claim 15, wherein the indication to the driver comprises an audio instruction. 21. A method for determining driver errors, comprising: receiving a safety warning from a safety warning system; determining, using a processor, an appropriate driver response based at least in part on the safety warning; determining a driver response; and determining whether the driver response comprises the appropriate driver response; and in the event the driver response does not comprise the appropriate driver response, indicating a driver error. 22. A computer program product for determining driver errors, the computer program product being embodied in a non-transitory computer readable storage medium and comprising computer instructions for: receiving a safety warning from a safety warning system; 

 determining an appropriate driver response based at least in part on the safety warning; determining a driver response; and determining whether the driver response comprises the appropriate driver response; and in the event the driver response does not comprise the appropriate driver response, indicating a driver error.
